calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Aug-25-2015 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar Dec-04-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Emily Foehr for Petitioner.

The Court noted that this is a petition to admit a lost will and stated that it does not see a problem with it. The Court granted the petition for letters of administration with will annexed (subject to review of the order). Bond is not required.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. McConico. (Not Reported)
